name: different_current_spouse
note: Bob can't currently be married to both — a genuine mutually-exclusive conflict.

name: mutual_manager
note: Reports-to is single-headed; they can't each manage the other.

name: shared_event_conflicting_date
a_claims: Alice organized the Q3 launch, scheduled for October 14.
b_claims: Bob is presenting at the Q3 launch on November 2.
note: Same event, two incompatible current dates.

name: conflicting_headcount_same_org
a_claims: Alice founded Atlas Corp, which currently has 12 employees.
b_claims: Bob works at Atlas Corp, which currently employs about 400 people.
note: One current headcount for the same org; 12 vs ~400 is a real conflict.

name: conflicting_ownership_of_object
a_claims: Alice owns the lake cabin outright.
b_claims: Bob is the sole owner of the lake cabin.
note: Two claimed SOLE owners of one thing.

name: conflicting_current_residence_same_person_ref
a_claims: Alice notes that Dad currently lives with her in Denver.
b_claims: Bob notes that Dad currently lives with him in Seattle.
note: Dad's single current residence is described two ways.

name: complementary_same_employer
note: Colleagues at one firm living in different cities — no conflict.

name: consistent_marriage_both_directions
note: The SAME marriage stated from both sides — consistent, not a conflict.

name: accumulating_friends_not_conflict
a_claims: Alice is a close friend of Priya.
b_claims: Bob is a close friend of Priya.
note: Friendship is non-functional; Priya can befriend both.

name: historical_vs_current_employer
a_claims: Alice worked at Nimbus Software until 2021.
b_claims: Alice has worked at Atlas Corp since 2022.
note: A past job and a later current job about the same person — a timeline, not a conflict.

name: different_qualifier_timeframe
a_claims: The Denver office had 5 staff in 2019.
b_claims: The Denver office has 30 staff in 2024.
note: Different years — growth over time, not contradictory current values.

name: paraphrase_same_fact
a_claims: Alice is the CEO of Atlas Corp.
b_claims: Alice serves as Atlas Corp's chief executive officer.

name: sibling_and_cousin_distinct_relations
note: Different relations to different people — compatible.

name: same_org_different_roles
a_claims: Alice is the CFO of Atlas Corp.
b_claims: Bob is the CTO of Atlas Corp.
note: Distinct C-suite roles at one firm — no conflict.

name: measurement_vs_unrelated
a_claims: Alice's resting heart rate was recorded at 62 bpm.
